positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration featuring a serene mountain range emerging from stylized cosmic waves. The mountains should have crisp, solid silhouettes in deep navy and slate gray. The waves represent the cosmos, using gradients of luminous sapphire blue, deep indigo, and accents of iridescent gold glitter, giving a clean, celestial glow. Style should be a blend of modern geometric design and Art Deco fluidity. Central composition, suitable for screen printing on a soft background. High contrast, bold lines, clean edges, vector illustration quality. Photorealistic digital art quality, but simplified for print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logo, noise, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale only
